name: Key Lime Italian Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the zest (colored part of the rind) from 1 Key Lime and cut into small pieces.
2. Place the zest and sugar in a blender or food processor, and process until the zest is finely chopped.
3. Pour the mixture into a 3-quart saucepan.
4. Add water and salt to the pan, and heat until the sugar dissolves.
5. Cool the mixture.
6. Add enough water to Key Lime juice to make 2/3 cup liquid. Stir this into the cooled sugar mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into divided ice cube trays and freeze.
8. Once frozen, place the cubes in a container for blending.
9. Cover and blend until the cubes become a velvety slush.
10. Scoop into individual goblets or store, covered in the freezer.
Makes about 4 1/2 cups.
